headline: Columbia Threadneedle Investments Fixed Income Team Recognized with 2026 LSEG Lipper Fund Awards
summary: BOSTON, March 12, 2026--Columbia Threadneedle Investments today announced that its fixed income team has been recognized by the 2026 LSEG US Lipper Fund Awards for its consistently strong investment performance.
